summary: Color contrast fixes verified for signup and onboarding flow. All reported contrast issues (green checkmarks invisible, 'What type of creative are you?' heading invisible, text-white on light backgrounds) have been resolved. All text is now clearly readable with appropriate color contrast.
passed_tests: Signup page: Heading 'Start your free account' uses text-text-primary (dark text visible on light bg)
Signup page: Form labels use text-text-secondary (readable)
Signup page: Input text uses text-text-primary (visible)
Signup error: Error message uses text-red-600 on bg-red-50 (clearly readable)
Signup success: Success message uses text-green-700 on bg-green-50 with green checkmark (clearly visible)
Onboarding page: 'What type of creative are you?' heading uses text-text-primary (dark text on light bg - VISIBLE)
Onboarding page: 'WELCOME TO KOLOR STUDIO' sub-heading uses text-purple-600 (visible purple)
Onboarding page: Unselected industry card labels use text-text-secondary (readable)
Onboarding page: Selected industry card label uses text-purple-700 on bg-purple-50 (readable, NOT text-white)
Onboarding page: Continue button activates to bg-brand-primary (purple) when industry selected
Onboarding success: 'You're all set!' heading visible with green checkmark
OnboardingWizard: Step title uses text-text-primary (line 124 - visible)
OnboardingWizard: Step icon uses text-purple-600 (line 122 - visible)
OnboardingWizard: Tip box text uses text-purple-700 (line 135 - readable, NOT text-purple-300)
Login page: Heading 'Welcome back' uses text-text-primary
Login page: Error message uses text-red-600 on bg-red-50 (readable)
ForgotPassword: Error message uses text-red-600 (readable)
ForgotPassword: Success checkmark uses text-green-700 (visible green icon)
ResetPassword: Heading 'Create new password' uses text-text-primary
ResetPassword: Password strength 'Weak' label uses text-red-600 (readable)
ResetPassword: Password strength 'Strong' label uses text-green-700 (readable)
ResetPassword: 'Passwords do not match' uses text-red-600 (readable)
ResetPassword: 'Passwords match' uses text-green-700 (readable with green checkmark)
VerifyEmail: Error icon uses text-red-600 (visible)
VerifyEmail: Success icon uses text-green-700 (visible - verified in code)
critical_code_review_comments: All contrast fixes correctly applied as specified in the bug report
IndustryOnboarding.tsx: text-text-primary for heading (line 115), text-purple-700 for selected label (line 144) - CORRECT
OnboardingWizard.tsx: text-purple-600 for icon (line 122), text-purple-700 for tip text (line 135) - CORRECT
ForgotPassword.tsx: text-green-700 for success checkmark (line 77) - CORRECT
VerifyEmail.tsx: text-green-700 for success (line 46), text-red-600 for error (line 55) - CORRECT
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test accounts for visual contrast testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All color contrast issues in signup and onboarding flow have been verified as FIXED. The original issues were: 1) Green checkmark not visible on signup success - now uses text-green-700, 2) 'What type of creative are you?' heading invisible - now uses text-text-primary (dark text), 3) Various text-white/light colors on light backgrounds - all changed to appropriate dark colors. Key pages tested: /signup, /login, /onboarding, /forgot-password, /reset-password, /verify-email. All text now has proper contrast ratios.
